subject: Who's raising big bucks from Wall Street?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
There is a financial cost to not rubbing elbows with big donors. It's worth it, but it means our movement relies on grassroots supporters like you to chip in. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fbf6/45c30650/9ca5f091/66992d87/3055520214/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
It's a time-honored, bipartisan tradition:

Presidential candidates take time off the public campaign trail to privately court donors on Wall Street.

There's a new Bloomberg article about how most of the presidential candidates are keeping up that habit.

But not Elizabeth.

Wealthy donors can't buy exclusive access to her. She doesn't host any fancy fundraising events or spend time on the phone with people based on how much they can contribute.

Instead, she spends her time building our grassroots movement -- because that's how we get Washington to work for working people instead of Wall Street. It's also what we need to do to win. And we don't have a second to waste.

**But we 'll be honest: There is a financial cost to not rubbing elbows with big donors. It's worth it, but it means our movement relies on grassroots supporters like you to chip in.**

**[Can you make a contribution of $3 or whatever makes sense for you right now? That's how we'll make sure Elizabeth's voice can still stand out with so many well-funded candidates in the race.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fbf6/45c30650/9ca5f091/66992d86/3055520214/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTIyZW0yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190522em2-full")**

With Elizabeth, what you see is what you get.

She makes a consistent argument for big, structural change in interviews with reporters, at public town halls -- including in West Virginia, Ohio, and New Hampshire in the past few weeks -- and everywhere you see her.

She doesn't say anything different behind closed doors.

You know who _is_ raising big bucks from the financial industry?

Donald Trump. He reeled in almost $10 million in campaign cash from just two events -- just two days apart -- hosted by heads of big financial institutions.

Meanwhile, some big shots on Wall Street aren't thrilled about Elizabeth's big ideas. Like actually holding corporate executives accountable when they break the law. Or creating an Ultra-Millionaire Tax to pay for cancelling student loan debt for 42 million Americans, universal free public college, Universal Child Care and early education, and more.

**If Wall Street bankers don 't want to support Elizabeth because she has plans to level the playing field for working people, that's on them.**

**[But it does mean we all need to have her back. Chip in right now.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fbf6/45c30650/9ca5f091/66992d86/3055520214/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTIyZW0yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190522em2-full")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Today, Democrat leaders chose the far left over America’s working families
body:
Far-left activists, both inside Congress and out, have made it clear they don’t want Democrats to work with President Trump to help govern. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd09a5a203&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 22, 2019
---
| | |
# **Today, Democrat leaders chose the far left over America’s working families**

**President Donald J. Trump** invited Democrat leaders Sen. Chuck Schumer and House Speaker Nancy Pelosi to the White House today to discuss a bipartisan solution to fixing America's crumbling infrastructure. Congressional Democrats had other plans.

** Something to share**: [Congress showed today why its approval rating is 20%](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=179f26e4b7&e=3ee4985eea)

**Far-left activists** , both inside Congress and out, have made it clear they don’t want Democrats to work with President Trump to help govern. So before coming to the White House this morning, Speaker Pelosi changed her tune. Rather than talk about an opportunity for bipartisan leadership, she played to the party donors and base, lobbing a fresh conspiracy theory: “The President of the United States is engaged in a cover-up.”

**Right.**

**Congressional Democrats** spent more than $35 million on the Mueller report. It took 675 days, included nearly 3,000 subpoenas, and required 500 witness accounts. Despite being conducted by a far-from-unbiased legal team—one that has collectively donated at least _20 times_ more to Democrat as Republican candidates over the years—it found zero evidence of collusion or obstruction of justice. No charges were recommended for either.

**There is no legal case** against the President, in other words. All Democrats have left is a political one. In a democracy, that’s what elections are for. Democrat leaders might know this, but they’re powerless: Their activist base doesn’t want voters to have the last say.

**The result is a string of stunts** like the one Americans saw today. Speaker Pelosi and Sen. Schumer know they have to keep giving lip service to the real issues that working Americans care about—tax relief, jobs, high prescription drug prices, immigration, and so on—while only delivering on the agenda their base wants: obstruction and resistance.

**President Trump** wants bipartisan compromise because it’s the right thing to do for our country. Fortunately, he’s getting results either way. Today, 7 in 10 Americans rate the economy as good or very good. Of those, 85 percent say some or most of the credit goes to President Trump. Pay growth has “picked up sharply at the bottom half of the wage distribution,” [a new report says](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e8a3b8436&e=3ee4985eea), showing that working-class families are the ones seeing the biggest gains.

**Those amazing results** could be even better if Congressional Democrats chose to work with the President. And for that reason alone, it’s no surprise that they won’t.

[Watch President Trump deliver a statement from the Rose Garden.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6cf66975b3&e=3ee4985eea)

**More** : [Democrats in Congress wasted millions of taxpayer dollars on a hoax...](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4509515b4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: President Trump presents the Public Safety Officer Medal of Valor**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=035f9eb417&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **This afternoon,** President Trump presented some of America’s best and bravest with our Nation’s highest public safety award, the Medal of Valor.

**“We express** the gratitude and pride of our Nation for your immortal acts of courage,” the President said during a ceremony in the White House East Room. “To the families who join us, you carry a great burden so that our citizens can live in safety and in peace.”
---
|
---
|

name: Tina Smith
subject: How to act on climate change:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Please take two minutes to read this tonight.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201905_climate?source=rtw_20190522_em-b&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

Tackling our climate crisis requires serious, quick, and bold action -- and I'm writing to you today about legislation I've just introduced to make the U.S. a leader in this fight.

**The Clean Energy Standard Act will put our country on course to reduce greenhouse gas emissions from electrical generators by nearly _80 percent_ by 2035, compared to 2005 emissions. This is the bold action we need to address our climate crisis.**

To change the trajectory we've put our planet on, we've got to take action together. If we don't all commit to prioritizing action on climate change, we'll lose our chance to course correct -- creating catastrophic implications for us and our children.

**[That's why today I'm asking you to sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the Clean Energy Standard Act. By adding your name, you're sending a clear message that we must act to protect our environment and slow climate change _now_.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201905_climate?source=rtw_20190522_em-b&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201905_climate?source=rtw_20190522_em-b&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") I'm proud that Minnesota is already a leader in finding affordable ways to reduce emissions. Now, I want the nation to follow our lead.

This fight isn't easy -- especially since Donald Trump has withdrawn from the Paris Climate Agreement and stacked the EPA with climate change deniers. But time is running out to save our planet from irreversible damage, and we can't let the naysayers stop us.

**[Friend, I'm personally asking you to stand with me and sign on as a co-sponsor of the Clean Energy Standard Act today. This is about public health, our environment, and making sure that America is leading when it comes to tackling the climate crisis -- and we can't do this without you.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201905_climate?source=rtw_20190522_em-b&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Congress believes an illusion - will Christians care?
body:
| | Peter, I believe the biggest threat to the moral fiber of the U.S. is the illusion that there is no gender. I’ve said this before, but it’s worth mentioning again in light of recent news. **Every Democrat and eight Republicans in the House, for the first time in history, voted to affirm a twisted illusion on gender by passing the Equality Act by a vote of 236 to 173 last Friday.** First, the introduction of “no-fault divorce” in 1970 birthed the mindset that marriage wasn’t sacred. Next came the redefinition of marriage and today, we are slipping even further away from what God designed and established - male and female. **The nation’s rejection of the biblical definition of gender would not only unearth social and moral decay throughout our country, but as the Equality Act ensures, it would terminate one of the most cherished rights in America - religious freedom.** [At My Faith Votes, we care a lot about religious freedom. It was the foundation of our country’s formation, and it still draws people to America today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190523apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190523apl01nd&n=1). [Every Christian must commit to vote to protect religious freedom - and we need your help to reach them](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190523apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190523apl01nd&n=2). Peter, look no further than sexual orientation and gender identity laws and ordinances already in place in various cities and states where individuals are forced to violate their sincerely held religious beliefs. We’ve seen a teacher fired in Virginia for failing to use the proper gender pronoun for a recently transitioned transgender student. Florists, photographers, and bakers have been prosecuted because they denied participating in same-sex wedding ceremonies. Imagine how these stories would only increase if federal law mandated that an unlimited number of genders and gender preferences be recognized with no religious exception or exemption. **None of what I’ve just told you is politically correct, and the mainstream media has repeatedly sought to demonize me for saying this, but that doesn’t matter. I will always promote what is biblically correct. The truth matters.** **Christians need to wake up.** All 435 members of the House of Representatives face re-election in 2020\. If your representative doesn’t protect your biblical values, they must be unseated and replaced with someone who does. **More than 25 million Christians don’t vote in presidential election years. We can change this if we work together.** We have a strategic plan to reach them by linking arms with prominent leading Christian voices. We’ll deploy messages on broadcast media, social media, and on-the-ground efforts in states across America. **[But we need your prayers and financial support Peter to make this possible](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190523apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190523apl01nd&n=3). [Please make your best donation of $5, $10, $25, or any amount today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190523apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190523apl01nd&n=4)!** We can’t let up on the gas. The House of Representatives is pushing an ideology threatening the very values that we hope to protect for future generations. Please pray today for our country and donate to be a part of our 2020 action plan. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190523apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190523apl01nd&n=5) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190523apl01nd&n=6)

Peter, look no further than sexual orientation and gender identity laws and ordinances already in place in various cities and states where individuals are forced to violate their sincerely held religious beliefs. We’ve seen a teacher fired in Virginia for failing to use the proper gender pronoun for a recently transitioned transgender student. Florists, photographers, and bakers have been prosecuted because they denied participating in same-sex wedding ceremonies. Imagine how these stories would only increase if federal law mandated that an unlimited number of genders and gender preferences be recognized with no religious exception or exemption. None of what I’ve just told you is politically correct, and the mainstream media has repeatedly sought to demonize me for saying this, but that doesn’t matter. I will always promote what is biblically correct. The truth matters. Christians need to wake up. All 435 members of the House of Representatives face re-election in 2020\. If your representative doesn’t protect your biblical values, they must be unseated and replaced with someone who does. More than 25 million Christians don’t vote in presidential election years. We can change this if we work together. We have a strategic plan to reach them by linking arms with prominent leading Christian voices. We’ll deploy messages on broadcast media, social media, and on-the-ground efforts in states across America. . ! We can’t let up on the gas. The House of Representatives is pushing an ideology threatening the very values that we hope to protect for future generations. Please pray today for our country and donate to be a part of our 2020 action plan. United. We Stand. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman * ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

body:
We're kicking it into high gear over the next few weeks.

| | |
---
| | **[We have a plan to win the summer, and it starts with making sure Kirsten can crisscross Iowa and New Hampshire as much as possible. Donate right now to help keep her out on the road and build our campaign in these crucial early states.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977392/2ae112ef/6841adf7/357c76c6/3665765929/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMzQtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3134-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
---
Peter, hi! I'm Jacob, and I'm a new member of Team Gillibrand in charge of growing and expanding our operations in the states with the earliest elections next year: Iowa and New Hampshire.
Kirsten's performance in those two contests will be a BIG deal for our campaign. So I'm coming on board with a plan to win the summer, and we're kicking it into high gear over the next few weeks.
**It starts with growing our team.** We want to add 100 new staff and organizers by the summer to help us connect with voters across both states and host dozens of events. Our enthusiastic organizers will be ready to go fight for what we believe in.
**Kirsten is barnstorming Iowa in June.** She's spending three straight weekends there, going coffee shop to coffee shop, brewery to brewery, meeting and connecting with voters and getting her message out there. In July, she'll crisscross New Hampshire doing the same. And Henry Gillibrand is leading the charge to get us an RV for those long Iowa road trips!
**We 're building up a sophisticated data-targeting operation.** By working smart and building a modern, robust campaign operation, we can reach even more voters and caucus-goers and convince them to support Kirsten.
**And we 're opening offices in both states** to support all this organizing. We already have an office in Iowa and one in New Hampshire with plans to open even more.
**[If you want to help make all of this happen and more, make a donation today. Your gift will help us hire staff and organizers in Iowa and New Hampshire AND it will enable Kirsten to visit these early states more and more, which is crucial to our winning strategy:](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977392/2ae112ef/6841adf7/357c76c6/3665765929/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMzQtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3134-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

3. Your donation will make a difference because **[grassroots donors are the only people who fund our movement.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fb08/45c30650/9c678bf7/6699d61f/2378455655/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTIzZW0xLXYxczMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190523em1-v1s3")** We don't take any money from federal lobbyists or PACs of any kind.

4. **[Your donation supports policy ideas that break new ground.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fb08/45c30650/9c678bf7/6699d61f/2378455655/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTIzZW0xLXYxczMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190523em1-v1s3")** Are you glad that Elizabeth is out there on the campaign trail proposing bold ideas like Universal Child Care and cancelling student loan debt? Do you love that she's got plans, plans, and more plans for big, structural change? You can help power that.

5. You might not know which candidate you'll be supporting in the Democratic primary. We get it! It's a crowded field, and it's early. But if you want Elizabeth's voice to keep breaking through, **[you can contribute while still keeping your options open.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fb08/45c30650/9c678bf7/6699d61f/2378455655/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTIzZW0xLXYxczMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190523em1-v1s3")**

**Can we make it official? Can we put it on the books?

Will May 23, 2019 go down as the date you made your first contribution and owned a piece of this campaign for the first time? Will we celebrate your donate-a-versary one year from today?

[Your support makes everything possible and is the only way we can grow our movement for big, structural change that will put power in the hands of working people, not the wealthy and well-connected. name: Team Our Revolution
subject: Canvass for Yasmine Taeb any day this weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Yasmine Taeb--a progressive Democrat--is running in the most important election in Virginia this summer.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4cc/bed43eb/95f29ce3/75fa968d/307379069/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Dear Friends,
Yasmine Taeb - a progressive Democrat - is running in the most important election in Virginia this summer. The only way she'll win is if we're able to contact the thousands of people at the door who need to hear her message for the Commonwealth. That's why canvassing with us is so important.
**This weekend - May 25th and 26th - we'll be meeting up at 5214 Lonsdale Dr, Springfield, VA 22151 at 11 am each day.**
**[RSVP Saturday, May 25th](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4cc/bed43eb/95f29ce3/75fa968c/307379069/VEsE/ "https://www.mobilize.us/yasmineforvirginia/event/93456/?source=em190523-va")**
**[RSVP Sunday, May 26th](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4cc/bed43eb/95f29ce3/75fa968f/307379069/VEsF/ "https://www.mobilize.us/yasmineforvirginia/event/93457/?source=em190523-va")**
If you have any questions about this or future events, please contact Field Director Dan Ford at [dmford13@gmail.com](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4cc/bed43eb/95f29ce3/75fa968e/307379069/VEsC/ "http://dmford@gmail.com") or at 703-232-3532.
In Solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution
PS: This **Monday, May 27, is Memorial Day,** and there's a very important **Memorial Day parade & festival in Falls Church City.** The Yasmine Taeb campaign is going to have a booth and needs people to come out and help staff it! We'll also be part of the actual parade, holding up signs, wearing stickers, and reminding people about the importance of this election. Taeb needs supporters who will help us by staffing the booth and also marching along the parade route. **The events begin at 9 am on Memorial Day** and we'll need help from then till it ends at 5 pm. If you'd like to come just for the parade - that would be great, too! The parade begins around 2 pm, but come a bit early so you can line up with us. We can pick up hundreds and hundreds of votes if we have a strong volunteer base marching along with us during the parade and also staffing our booth.
[**To RSVP for volunteering at the parade, click here!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4cc/bed43eb/95f29ce3/75fa9689/307379069/VEsD/ "https://www.mobilize.us/yasmineforvirginia/event/93627/?source=em190523-va")

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

subject: Pelosi, Dems Just Don't Care About Our National Emergency
body:
"First, Pelosi and Democrats denied the existence of the national emergency. Now, they are willing to let federal agencies run out of money to..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8ba3a55bb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Pelosi, Dems Just Don't Care About Our National Emergency**

“Now in the majority with control over the House floor, Speaker Nancy Pelosi and her conference are poised to let funding for the Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) program run out . . . First, Pelosi and Democrats denied the existence of the national emergency. Now, they are willing to let federal agencies run out of money to care for migrant children,” Reps. Chip Roy (R-TX), Andy Biggs (R-AZ), Jim Jordan (R-OH) write in Fox News.

“How bad does it have to get for Pelosi to care?”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e58282633&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Pelosi’s "cover-up" remark is just “part of her now-daily act of political cognitive dissonance in which she accuses Mr. Trump of committing impeachable offenses to appease her anti-Trump ultras while opposing impeachment lest it jeopardize swing-district Democrats in 2020,” _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf611cabf9&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. President Trump “has decided to call her bluff and offer a choice—impeachment or bipartisan progress.”
---
|
---
| “First lady Melania Trump made a special trip Wednesday to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center in Bethesda, Maryland, to meet with ‘wounded warriors’ and present a Purple Heart,” Katie Jerkovich reports for _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5f9272991&e=3ee4985eea)_. “I want to thank the service members I met today,” the First Lady said. “As each of them recovers, we are reminded of the cost of our country’s security. I am grateful.”
---
|
---
| “A cadre of former top Obama administration figures and their allies in Congress have been working to amplify anti-Trump talking points issued by a senior Iranian regime official in what sources have described as an effort by Obama's pro-Iran echo chamber to drive a wedge between President Donald Trump and his national security team,” Adam Kredo writes in _[The Washington Free Beacon](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7971e3b1b1&e=3ee4985eea)_. Democrats are “doing all they can to subvert Trump, even if it means siding with the Iranian regime in the standoff.”
---
|
---
| “Two illegal aliens, one who came to the United States in 2015 as part of a ‘family unit’ and the other unaccompanied in 2016, were released by the Prince George’s County Police Department after being charged with attempted first degree murder and other crimes. Upon release, they killed 14-year-old girl Ariana Funes-Diaz and dumped her body in a creek,” Katie Pavlich writes in _[Townhall](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eda2b1fbcb&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Prince George's County, which contains Baltimore, is a ‘sanctuary’ for illegal aliens. Both are members of the extremely violent gang MS-13.”
---
|

name: Joe Biden
subject: Donald Trump tried to attack me at his campaign rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I've never forgotten where I came from. | Peter --

Donald Trump tried to attack me at his campaign rally by saying I abandoned Pennsylvania.

Well Peter, I've never forgotten where I came from. **My family did have to leave Pennsylvania when I was 10 -- we moved to Delaware where my Dad found a job that could provide for our family.**

Let's be clear Peter: this isn't just about me. This is proof that Donald Trump doesn't understand the struggles working folks go through.

He doesn't understand what it's like to worry you will lose the roof over your head. He doesn't understand what it's like to wonder if you'll be able to put food on the table.

And he doesn't understand that the longest walk a parent can make is up a short flight of stairs to their child's bedroom to sit on the end of the bed and say, honey, I'm sorry. I'm so sorry. We have to move. You can't go back to your school. You won't see your friends. You can't play on that team. You can't be in the choir because Daddy lost his job or Mommy lost her job.

My dad had to make that walk in Scranton, Pennsylvania. It wasn't until I was older that I realized how hard it must have been for him.

But he was not alone. This story isn't unique to the Bidens. Too many people around this country have had to make that walk.

**That 's why I've spent my whole career fighting -- and I will continue to fight -- like hell so that no one ever has to make that walk again. **

I'm ready to keep fighting. And Peter, I hope I can count on you to be by my side. **If you 're with me, will you chip in to my campaign today?** | | [**$5**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bde/1cd0ac28/3d498b41/356b5b83/2235341784/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190523Pennsylvania-b1_FDR_RS_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190521Pennsylvania&utm_content=b1_FDR_RS_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=5")

body:
Here is the truth:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1443%2E150750%2E7DCJ0z)

Friends -
Here is the truth: Big money dominates absolutely everything that goes on in government. In Washington, D.C., you get what you pay for:
The military-industrial complex gets their weapons systems and our children get shipped off to endless wars.
The fossil fuel industry gets to keep pumping and burning oil and the rest of us deal with the consequences of climate change.
The pharmaceutical industry gets to charge whatever they want for life-saving drugs and people are forced to sit at their kitchen tables cutting pills just to survive.
Health care CEOs profit tremendously from a dysfunctional system of care that prioritizes profits over patients while 30 million people lack any health care at all and even more are under-insured.
The gun manufacturers get laws that allow almost anyone to easily buy a firearm without a background check while almost 40,000 people each year are killed with a gun and parents are sending their kids to school with bulletproof backpacks.
Big banks get to make obscene levels of profit with little to no oversight, and millions of Americans lose their homes and life savings because of the greed and recklessness of Wall Street.
The needs and desires of the rich and powerful are almost always well-attended to, and the pain of working families is ignored.
And on and on and on and on it goes.
**The truth is, you cannot change a corrupt system that is stacked against the American people if you are begging the people who profit from that system for their money.**
Our campaign does things differently than anyone in the history of American politics. This is a campaign funded almost exclusively by the people, young people and working people, giving small amounts of money, mostly responding to emails like this.
But that also means from time to time we have to ask. And today, with our opponents raising huge sums of money at high-dollar fundraising events in people’s homes, I have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our end of month fundraising deadline as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying elections in this country?**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190523-1-v1-30&t=26&akid=1443%2E150750%2E7DCJ0z)
Today, virtually no piece of legislation can get passed unless it has the okay from corporate America. That is going to change when we are in the White House.
In 2016, we proved that one could run for president without hustling rich people for money. In 2020, we’re going to prove that we can win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190523-1-v1-30&t=27&akid=1443%2E150750%2E7DCJ0z)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1443%2E150750%2E7DCJ0z). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1443%2E150750%2E7DCJ0z). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1443_150750_7DCJ0z&akid=1443%2E150750%2E7DCJ0z).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=31&akid=1443%2E150750%2E7DCJ0z).

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name to oppose President Trump's extreme judicial nominees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[Add your name to oppose President Trump's extreme judicial nominees now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cb7/42ab3cf4/7c891fae/135d62c9/106802479/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/protect-our-courts?source=em190523&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
We are seeing a disturbing pattern in the Senate. Republicans aren't concerned about tradition or protecting women's rights--only installing President Trump's radical judges on the bench.
For example, Senate Republicans just confirmed Wendy Vitter to a lifetime appointment in Louisiana, even though she has spent years attacking women's rights and access to care with outrageous claims that contraception causes cancer and Planned Parenthood kills women.
It's no coincidence that Republican state legislators are banning abortion at the same time that the Senate GOP is stacking the federal bench with radical, anti-choice judges. Their goal is clear: they're attempting to set up a test case to overturn Roe v. Wade at the Supreme Court.
**[With women's rights already under attack, we can't sit silently as Senate Republicans confirm anti-choice judges to the bench. Sign on now to help protect our courts.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cb7/42ab3cf4/7c891fae/135d62c9/106802479/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/protect-our-courts?source=em190523&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Earlier this year, Republicans confirmed anti-choice Eric Miller despite the fact that neither of Washington's Senators returned blue slips supporting him, casually tossing aside the long-standing, bipartisan tradition that ensures the integrity of the Senate's role in judicial confirmations.
Just last week, they did it again, confirming abortion opponent Kenneth Lee without blue slips. And this week, they confirmed yet another radical judge, Daniel Collins, who previously advocated for denying female employees contraception in the Hobby Lobby case.
Peter, our courts are now facing a real, coordinated threat. The list of President Trump's radical judicial nominees grows by the day, and the GOP is complicit in confirming them to lifetime posts on the bench. We can't stop fighting to protect our courts.
**[The Senate GOP must put a stop this madness. Extreme judicial nominees do not deserve lifetime appointments to the federal bench. Add your name now if you agree.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cb7/42ab3cf4/7c891fae/135d62c9/106802479/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/protect-our-courts?source=em190523&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cb7/42ab3cf4/7c891fae/135d62c9/106802479/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/protect-our-courts?source=em190523&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: this simply can't stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | Friend, it's a dark time for women in this country.

State by state, we're seeing our reproductive rights put on the chopping block to score political points. These laws are the most restrictive we've ever seen. Just last week, the governor of Alabama signed a law that outlaws abortion after 6 weeks, before most women even know they're pregnant, with no exceptions for rape or incest.

It's more important than ever that we speak out. **_[Please sign on now to stand up for a woman's right to safe and accessible healthcare.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113db8/622b7b5b/1fa5b312/307b2ec5/3528800579/VEsH/ "http://www.paction.us/abortion_bans/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+Please+sign+on+now+to+stand+up+for+a+wom&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190522_1_1&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190522_1_1")_**

[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113db8/622b7b5b/1fa5b312/307b2ec4/3528800579/VEsE/ "http://www.paction.us/abortion_bans/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190522_1_1&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190522_1_1")
Women are being used as political pawns. The GOP's goal is simple: they want to have a case challenged all the way up to the Supreme Court, where they hope Roe v. Wade will be overturned once and for all.

Absolutely no one should have a say over what a woman chooses to do with her own body. The idea that these so-called "legislative leaders" feel entitled to dictate reproductive choices is harrowing, and we have to do everything in our power to protect the reproductive rights the generations before us fought so hard to secure.

**_[Please, join me in standing up for reproductive rights. Sign on now.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113db8/622b7b5b/1fa5b312/307b2ec7/3528800579/VEsF/ "http://www.paction.us/abortion_bans/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3+-+Please+join+me+in+standing+up+for+reprod&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190522_1_1&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190522_1_1")_**

Thank you,

Debbie

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: With every revolution comes the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Ed's Green New Deal is a revolution--one that is putting fear in the hearts of the fossil fuel industry across the country because people are taking notice, speaking up, and demanding change.

In the face of the opposition, in the face of climate-denier-in-chief Donald Trump, and in the face of critics and naysayers, tens of thousands of people, young and old, are organizing to save all of creation through massive job creation.

**That 's what the Green New Deal will do, and that's what Ed is fighting for every day.**

But with every revolution comes the fight from the forces that want to keep the status quo.

body:
Did you see this email last night? The numbers don’t lie.

We need to raise $500,000 before midnight on May 31 to stay on track, and

subject: Walking the walk - Julián joins strike with McDonald's employees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd23/3eb3e2fc/4f2cda75/74499d1a/1804631092/VEsH/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds&source=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds")
---
| | Today, at the McDonald's annual shareholders meeting, Julian joins thousands of employees as they strike for a $15 minimum wage, improved working conditions, and the right to unionize. **" I'm proud to join the Fight for $15 and McDonald's employees from across the country to stand up for workers' rights and ensure they have a seat at the table to negotiate." - Julian Castro** **** Companies across the United States are making more and more money, but they're not passing any of it down to the people who make the profit for them. American workers shouldn't have to choose between paying rent and putting food on the table. [**Join Juli an in his pledge to not patronize McDonald's until their employees are paid a living wage.**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd23/3eb3e2fc/4f2cda75/74499d19/1804631092/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcgen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Join+Juliaacuten+in+his+pledge+to+not+pa&utm_campaign=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds&source=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds") [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd23/3eb3e2fc/4f2cda75/74499d18/1804631092/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/fightfor15/status/1131563098530123776?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds&source=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds") **Juli an is literally walking the walk with McDonald's employees in Durham, North Carolina, and strikers all around the nation, PLUS our campaign pays interns a minimum of $15 an hour, offers paid sick days and vacation time, has a strong sexual harrassment policy, and our staff has unionized.** You can make your voice heard by [supporting Julian](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd23/3eb3e2fc/4f2cda75/74499d07/1804631092/VEsC/ "http://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m////7449847c//VEsB/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+supporting+Juliaacuten&utm_campaign=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds&source=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds") in his campaign for an America that puts people first. \-- Stand with us.
**#TeamJuli an** [DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd23/3eb3e2fc/4f2cda75/74499d06/1804631092/VEsD/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m////7449847c//VEsB/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds&source=20190523_em_event_mc-donalds")

name: Cory Booker
subject: So, I've got to ask: What's holding you back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, We're about to turn the corner into a brand-new phase of this campaign: Debate Season! It'll be our first opportunity to truly separate ourselves from the pack. That means time is running out to build this underdog, grassroots operation. **So, before everything speeds up, I 've got to ask: What's holding you back?** I'd be honored if you choose today to [_**make your first donation and be forever recognized as one of the founders of this campaign**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0956/5fca0d19/ac69cf/291b6c94/1529175024/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190523-em2?refcode=em_surv_20190523_CB_20190523-surv-CB-holding-activendnr_activendnr_l1"). But if you're not ready, that's OK. [_**Please take a minute to let me know what 's keeping you from donating to our campaign.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0956/5fca0d19/ac69cf/291b6c93/1529175024/VEsE/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/take-this-quick-survey?source=em_20190523") Some of the other campaigns out there don't need to worry about fundraising as much as an underdog campaign like ours does. They've shown they can pull in millions of dollars on any day of the week. We're not so lucky. We're rejecting cash from D.C. lobbyists and corporate PACs, because it's the right thing to do. We're building this campaign from the ground up with one donation at a time, and it all depends on people like you. The truth is when more candidates have qualified for the debates than there are spots on the stage, the DNC will break ties based on how many individual people have chipped in to support each campaign. [_**Your donation, even just $1, gets us one step closer to solidifying our spot on stage in those critical debates this summer.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0956/5fca0d19/ac69cf/291b6c92/1529175024/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190523-em2?refcode=em_surv_20190523_CB_20190523-surv-CB-holding-dnr_dnr_l2") But if you're not ready to chip in yet, I understand. [_**Please take a minute to let me know what 's holding you back.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0956/5fca0d19/ac69cf/291b6c91/1529175024/VEsC/ "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/take-this-quick-survey?source=em_20190523") I truly believe that support isn't just given -- it has to be earned, and I'll do my best to do just that. No matter what, I appreciate you and am grateful for all you do. Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0956/5fca0d19/ac69cf/291b6c90/1529175024/VEsD/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190523-em2?refcode=em_surv_20190523_CB_20190523-surv-CB-holding-dnr_dnr_contribbutton")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0956/5fca0d19/ac69cf/291b6c9e/1529175024/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0956/5fca0d19/ac69cf/291b6c9d/1529175024/VEsO/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0956/5fca0d19/ac69cf/291b6c9c/1529175024/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us.
